meaning: n.伙伴关系,交情,团体,奖学金,友谊
examples: He managed to get a fellowship, and he came to the UK all the way from New Zealand.
He was offered a research fellowship at Yale.
There was a great deal of soldierly good fellowship.
In 2009, she earned a Journalism Law School fellowship from Loyola Law School in California.
The Beeby Fellowship is a joint initiative between the New Zealand National Commission for UNESCO and NZCER.
